title: EDA-Problem-Integration
description: Workflow basado en problemas Davis para EDA

value.customFilter:
event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM"
and event.status == "ACTIVE"
and event.status_transition == "CREATED"
and (event.category == "AVAILABILITY"
or event.category == "ERROR"
or event.category == "RESOURCE_CONTENTION")
//and (event.name == "[AESM] [Filenet] custom.filenet.objectstoresp.docs_created_last_hour"
//or event.name == "[AESM] [Filenet] custom.filenet.objectstoreca.docs_created_last_hour")

input.subject: PoC autoremediacion EDA - Problems

send_event_to_event-driven-ansible_1.name: send_event_to_event-driven-ansible_1
send_event_to_event-driven-ansible_1.description: Send an event to the Red Hat Event-Driven-Ansible Controller via Event Source Plugin
